NTALS OF ASTROLOGY
the ArhSa of Cancer, Pisces or Capricorn (without benetic
aspect or association), (iii) The Moon in the ascendant. Sun
in the 7th, and Mars and Saturn in the 2nd and 12th. (iv) The
Sun and Rahu occupying the 8th house, more so if Mars too
joins them, (v) If the Sun, Venus and Saturn are together in a
single house, (vi) The Sun in a house belonging to Mars being
aspected by Saturn, (vii) Rahu in Leo being aspected by Venus,
(viii) The lord of the ascendant and Mercury, or Mars and the
Moon being conjoined with Rahu or Ketu anywhere, (ix) The
Sun and Mars being conjoined with Saturn, (x) The Moon
being conjoined with Mars and Saturn in Aries or Taurus, (xi)
Venus, Mars, the Moon and Saturn being together in Capri-
corn, Cancer or Scorpio, provided there is no benefic in the
Lagna. (xii) Jupiter or Venus in the 6th and malefics in 1.
(xiii) The Moon being surrounded by malefics, and the 7th
house occupied by Saturn.
Poison through snake-bite etc. (i) Rahu in the Lagna,
